title: Saga - Rekt
relevance_summary: Cross-chain bridge exploit using IBC mechanism to mint tokens without collateral

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends custom IBC messages to a bridge precompile without proper validation

red_flags: infinite minting of tokens without collateral
monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT SENDS CUSTOM IBC MESSAGES TO A BRIDGE PRECOMPILE WITHOUT PROPER VALIDATION
summary: An attacker exploited Saga's IBC mechanism to mint $7 million worth of Saga Dollar tokens without collateral, then bridged the tokens to Ethereum and converted them to ETH. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring for custom IBC messages sent to bridge precompiles.
